title: Create: Bamboo Island
description: Just imagine for a moment being on an island high up in the sky with no contact with the ground and having to work out EVERYTHING from just one single bamboo shoot!
body:
![Logo of Create: Bamboo Island](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a4f3905075853c4abf73f7c67af66d4531921a0.png) ## What is this pack As you might have guessed from the logo, Create Bamboo Island is a Skyblock modpack, but on a grass block with just one regrowing bamboo shoot on top. Given these less-than-ideal circumstances, you (and your friends) have the freedom to expand your island with everything a single bamboo can provide, and that's very much with my changes. Starting with a lot of cutting, the Create mod will open more and more opportunities the further you go. To help you navigate this challenge, I've embedded an advancement guide leading you all the way to the Ender Dragon!

### Future Plans - A trailer - New automation possibilities - Any ideas submitted on GitHub or Discord may be considered.
